mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 011 > history > Or had patrol found any one of the
mechanics.excerpt: Or had patrol found any one of the five sleeping guards we'd left along our path? Not that really mattered one way or the other. 'We're madel yelled out; running for pile of heavy plastic crates stacked near the OmniMech: The Man 0 War towered over us like some armored giant: Twelve meters tall; it commanded the bay just as would any battlefield or one of the Solaris arenas.
